chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-5851 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ PRIORITY CASE: 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.5603/2024. 3. For hearing of CMA No.5604/2024. 4. For hearing of CMA No.27317/2023. 5. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 26th April 2024 Agha Shahid Majeed Khan, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, D.A.G. Mr. Muhammad Anas Makhdoom, Advocate for Respondent No.3 and for proposed Intervenor. -*-*-*-*-*- Learned counsel for the respondent No.3 has drawn the attention of this Court to C.M.A. No.5603/2024 filed on behalf of the proposed intervenor and C.M.A. No.5604/2024 filed on behalf of the respondent No.3 under Order I Rule 10 CPC, wherein, it has been prayed that since the proposed intervenor i.e. Gul Ahmed Energy Limited Employees Provident Fund Trust is the relevant party to the proceedings, as the complaint was filed by proposed intervenor and not by respondent No.3, therefore, respondent No.3 having no concern with the subject controversy and its name may be deleted from the array of the respondents and the name of proposed intervenor may be impleaded as party in place of the aforesaid respondent No.3. Learned counsel for the petitioner does not dispute such factual position and extends his no objection to grant aforesaid applications. Accordingly, by consent, C.M.A Nos.5603 and 5604 of 2024 are granted. Learned counsel for the petitioner is directed to file amended title by deleting the name of respondent No.3 i.e.

Accordingly, by consent, C.M.A Nos.5603 and 5604 of 2024 are granted. Learned counsel for the petitioner is directed to file amended title by deleting the name of respondent No.3 i.e. Gul [Page 2] Ahmed Energy Limited and by impleading the name of proposed intervenor i.e. Gul Ahmed Energy Limited Employees Provident Fund Trust, from the array of respondents within seven days. Since learned counsel for the respondent No.3 is representing Gul Ahmed Energy Limited Employees Provident Fund Trust, therefore, no further notice is required. To come up after four weeks. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
